meta.title: ONLYMORE GROUP — Optimize Your Legacy
meta.description: French financial inclusion group through sport. 5 subsidiaries serving 3 fights: reducing poverty, stopping brain drain, combating forced emigration.

hero.title: Optimize Your Legacy.
hero.why: That everyone can live and thrive where they grew up.
hero.subtitle: 5 subsidiaries. 3 fights. Sport as a local economic lever.

mandela.quote: Sport has the power to change the world. It has the power to inspire. It has the power to unite people like few other things.
mandela.author: Nelson Mandela, Laureus World Sports Awards, 2000

boetcker.quote: You cannot help the poor by destroying the rich. You cannot help men permanently by doing for them what they could and should do for themselves.
boetcker.author: William J.H. Boetcker

founder.quote: Forced to find financial solutions because I was too disabled to work, not enough for a pension, and too young to be operated on... I transformed my exclusion into a mission: that no one lives what I have lived.
founder.author: Florent Gibert, Founder & CEO

infinity.title: One symbol. A whole world.
infinity.tagline: No beginning. No end. The local economy in perpetual motion.

colhybri.desc: SaaS solidarity commerce platform. Own Your Neighborhood. Own Your Future.

crownium.desc: Mutualist funding for professional sports clubs.

poverty.title: Reduce poverty
poverty.desc: Sport generates local wealth, creating economic opportunities where they are needed most.

talent.title: Stop brain drain
talent.desc: Dynamic local ecosystems allow talent to flourish without having to leave.

emigration.title: Combat forced emigration
emigration.desc: When a city thrives economically, no one is forced to leave it.

flow.4: No one is forced to leave

florent.bio: Self-taught, Marseille/Rodilhan, ex-construction, kung fu & karate

investors.title: Investors
investors.description: ONLYMORE Group is currently raising a pre-seed round of €200K-€350K at a pre-money valuation of €1.3M-€2.15M.
